subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath aided to exalt His Word amongst all peoples! Blessed art thou, O herald of the Kingdom of Abhá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وفقه الله علی اعلاء کلمته بین الوری طوبی لک ایها المنادی بملکوت الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
